name: Google Ads MCP - Ad Group Tools

nodes.name: Google Ads MCP Server - Ad Groups

parameters.name: list_ad_groups
parameters.description: Lists all ad groups within a specific campaign.

value.campaignId: ={{ $fromAI('campaignId', 'The ID of the campaign to list ad groups from.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_ad_group
parameters.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific ad group by its ID.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group to retrieve.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_ad_group
parameters.description: Creates a new ad group within a campaign.

value.campaignId: ={{ $fromAI('campaignId', 'The ID of the campaign to create the ad group in.', 'string') }}
value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'Name of the new ad group.', 'string') }}
value.status: ={{ $fromAI('status', 'Status of the ad group (e.g., PAUSED, ENABLED).', 'string') }}
value.cpcBidMicros: ={{ $fromAI('cpcBidMicros', 'Default CPC bid in micros (e.g., 10000000 for $10). Optional.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: update_ad_group
parameters.description: Updates an existing ad group's name, status, or bid.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group to update.', 'string') }}
value.name: ={{ $fromAI('name', 'New name of the ad group. Leave empty if unchanged.', 'string') }}
value.status: ={{ $fromAI('status', 'New status (PAUSED, ENABLED). Leave empty if unchanged.', 'string') }}
value.cpcBidMicros: ={{ $fromAI('cpcBidMicros', 'New CPC bid in micros. Leave empty if unchanged.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: pause_ad_group
parameters.description: Sets an ad group's status to PAUSED.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group to pause.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: enable_ad_group
parameters.description: Sets an ad group's status to ENABLED.

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group to enable.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: remove_ad_group
parameters.description: Sets an ad group's status to REMOVED (deleted).

value.adGroupId: ={{ $fromAI('adGroupId', 'The ID of the ad group to remove.', 'string') }}

parameters.jsCode:
if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row.adGroup || {} }));

if (items.length === 0 || !items[0].json.results) return [];
return items[0].json.results.map(row => ({ json: row }));
